basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Project Lead Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Jammu is recruiting 01 Project Lead (Postdoctoral Researcher).

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: To be announced / Check official website

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 40 years (relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/Women/PwD and 3 years for OBC-NCL)
qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate degree in Electrical Engineering / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Signal Processing or related discipline with Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics and Communication Engineering

how_to_apply: Interested candidates should apply as per the instructions given in the detailed advertisement available on the official IIT Jammu website. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview.
For further details, visit the official website of IIT Jammu.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and project-based. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms. The appointment may be extended or terminated as per project requirements and performance.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Jammu Project Lead 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should check the official website for the exact last date (advertisement dated 07.07.2026).

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Lead positions are available at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: 01 position of Project Lead (Postdoctoral Researcher).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Lead at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: Consolidated salary is ₹75,000 per month + 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIT Jammu Postdoctoral Researcher?
faq.answer: Postgraduate degree with Ph.D. in Electrical/Electronics and Communication Engineering or related fields.

faq.question: Q5. What is the area of specialization for IIT Jammu SwaYaan Project?
faq.answer: Signal Processing, Machine Learning, AI, and Communication Engineering.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Jammu Project Lead position?
faq.answer: Maximum 40 years (with applicable relaxations).

faq.question: Q7. What is the project title at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: SwaYaan-Capacity Building for Human Resource Development in Unmanned Aircraft Systems (Drone and related Technology).

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of appointment for the Project Lead?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, may be extended depending on performance.

faq.question: Q9. Is PhD mandatory for IIT Jammu Project Lead (Postdoctoral Researcher)?
faq.answer: Yes, Ph.D. in relevant discipline is essential.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I apply for IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official IIT Jammu website for the detailed advertisement and application procedure.
